title: AUTHORIZE Message
description: RCAN message type 9. Human-in-the-Loop (HiTL) authorisation response (§16). Sent by a human operator to approve or reject a pending AI action that was gated by a hitl_gates rule. References the thought_id emitted in the corresponding PENDING_AUTH message.

message_type.description: Identifies this as an AUTHORIZE message.

ruri.description: Target robot's RURI — must match the PENDING_AUTH it is responding to.

thought_id.description: Identifier of the AI reasoning trace being approved or rejected. Matches the thought_id in the originating PENDING_AUTH message.

principal_id.description: Identity of the human operator making this authorisation decision.

decision.description: APPROVE allows the original command to proceed. REJECT discards it.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the operator made the decision.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this AUTHORIZE message.
